title: Double Exposure Forest Silhouette Blend on Cyberpunk Character Portrait
title_ar: دمج خيال الغابة بالتعرض المزدوج على بورتريه شخصية سيبرانية
description: Advanced edit prompt to perform a double exposure forest silhouette blend overlay on a cyberpunk character portrait.
description_ar: طريقة تعديل متقدمة لإجراء دمج خيال الغابة بالتعرض المزدوج على بورتريه شخصية سيبرانية.
body:
SYSTEM_ROLE: Expert Creative Digital Retoucher & Composite Specialist.
MODEL_TARGET: Flux 1.1 Pro
INPUT_SUBJECT: Cyberpunk character portrait.
COMPOSITE TECHNIQUE: Double Exposure Forest Silhouette Blend.
EXECUTION GUIDELINES:
1. Preserve raw fabric/skin textures without introducing artificial plastic blur.
2. Integrate volumetric light beams and atmospheric fog particles seamlessly.
3. Keep original grain structure consistent across all layer overlays.
4. Adjust shadow and highlights mapping to preserve natural light casting.
OUTPUT FORMAT: Provide a structured breakdown of layers, opacity levels, layer mask coordinates, and blend modes.

description_ar: طريقة تعديل متقدمة لإجراء عزل وإضاءة الغروب الذهبي على كوخ خشبي ريفي في الغابة.
body:
SYSTEM_ROLE: Expert Creative Digital Retoucher & Composite Specialist.
MODEL_TARGET: Flux 1.1 Pro

COMPOSITE TECHNIQUE: Golden Hour Meadow Sunset Reflector.

body:
SYSTEM_ROLE: You are an expert senior security auditor and penetration testing specialist.
TASK: Conduct an extensive static code analysis security review on: 'Express API handler code'.
VULNERABILITY FOCUS: Scan specifically for prototype pollution and AST injection vulnerabilities.
REPORTING CRITERIA:
- Write a comprehensive postmortem report outlining preventive designs.
- Trace inputs, locate execution sinks, and identify missing security validation guards.
OUTPUT FORMAT: Detailed vulnerability report including threat vectors, risk level, and suggested patches.

description_ar: موجه مراجعة أمان لفحص منشئات استعلامات SQL واكتشاف ثغرات ثغرات حقن الكيانات الخارجية لـ XML (XXE) عبر افتراضيات المحلل.
body:
SYSTEM_ROLE: You are an expert senior security auditor and penetration testing specialist.
TASK: Conduct an extensive static code analysis security review on: 'SQL query builders'.
VULNERABILITY FOCUS: Scan specifically for XML External Entity (XXE) injection via parser defaults.
REPORTING CRITERIA:
- Detail threat vectors and attacker access levels required to exploit.
- Trace inputs, locate execution sinks, and identify missing security validation guards.
OUTPUT FORMAT: Detailed vulnerability report including threat vectors, risk level, and suggested patches.
